content:
GitHub Repository: claude-flow

Claude API workflows and agent coordination

Installation & Setup Commands:
1. npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
2. # Or install globally
3. npm install -g claude-flow@alpha
4. npm install agentdb@1.3.9
5. npm run preinstall  # node -e "if(process.platform === 'win32' && process.env.npm_config_user_agent && process.env.npm_config_user_agent.includes('npm')) { console.warn('⚠️  Warning: On Windows, it is recommended to use pnpm to install this package to avoid potential native dependency build issues.'); console.warn('💡 Try: pnpm install or pnpx claude-flow@alpha'); }"
6. npm run dev  # node --experimental-wasm-modules src/cli/main.ts
7. npm run start  # node server.js
8. npm run init:neural  # node scripts/init-neural.js
9. npm run init:goal  # node scripts/init-goal.js
10. npm run build  # npm run clean && npm run update-version && npm run build:esm && npm run build:cjs && npm run build:binary
11. npm run update-version  # node scripts/update-bin-version.js
12. npm run clean  # rm -rf dist dist-cjs
13. npm run build:esm  # swc src -d dist --config-file .swcrc
14. npm run build:cjs  # swc src -d dist-cjs --config-file .swcrc
15. npm run build:ts  # npm run build:esm && npm run build:cjs
16. npm run build:binary  # pkg dist/src/cli/main.js --targets node18-linux-x64,node18-macos-x64,node18-win-x64 --output bin/claude-flow
17. npm run build:simple  # npm run build:ts && pkg dist/cli/simple-cli.js --output bin/claude-flow-simple
18. npm run typecheck  # tsc --noEmit
19. npm run typecheck:watch  # tsc --noEmit --watch
20. npm run dev:build  # tsc --watch

Repository: https://github.com/ruvnet/claude-flow
README: https://github.com/ruvnet/claude-flow/blob/main/README.md

metadata.focus: Claude API workflows and agent coordination

content:
GitHub Repository: ruvector

Vector/graph hybrid database for semantic search

Installation & Setup Commands:
1. npm install ruvector
2. npm install @ruvector/attention
3. npm install ruvector
4. # Or install individual packages
5. npm install @ruvector/core @ruvector/gnn @ruvector/graph-node
6. npx ruvector install
7. const db = new ruvector.VectorDB(128);
8. const layer = new ruvector.GNNLayer(128, 256, 4);
9. const router = new ruvector.Router();
10. npm run build  # cargo build --release
11. npm run build:node  # cd crates/ruvector-node && npm run build
12. npm run build:wasm  # cd crates/ruvector-wasm && npm run build
13. npm run build:graph  # npm run build:graph-node && npm run build:graph-wasm
14. npm run build:graph-node  # cd crates/ruvector-graph-node && napi build --platform --release
15. npm run build:graph-wasm  # cd crates/ruvector-graph-wasm && bash build.sh
16. npm run build:all  # npm run build && npm run build:node && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:graph
17. npm run test  # cargo test --workspace
18. npm run test:graph  # cargo test -p ruvector-graph --all-features
19. npm run test:integration  # cargo test --test graph_full_integration
20. npm run bench  # cargo bench -p ruvector-bench

Repository: https://github.com/ruvnet/ruvector
README: https://github.com/ruvnet/ruvector/blob/main/README.md

metadata.focus: Vector/graph hybrid database for semantic search
